summary: Comprehensive testing of Crunchyroll clone mobile app. Backend: 100% passing (20/20 tests). Frontend: ~80% passing with minor UI/navigation issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Sign In button remains visible after successful user registration. Should be hidden when user is logged in.
React warning: Duplicate key 'upcoming-62516' in anime list. FlatList keyExtractor should ensure unique keys.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' and 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode'

action_items: Fix duplicate React key issue in home screen anime list (upcoming-62516)
Hide 'Sign In' button in header when user is logged in (check AuthContext integration)
Update Image components to use props.resizeMode instead of style.resizeMode
Update components to use style.pointerEvents instead of props.pointerEvents
critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB _id field: Backend responses may include _id field which could cause JSON serialization issues. Consider excluding it with projection: {'_id': 0}
Backend server.py line 25: DB_NAME has fallback to 'anime_app' but .env has 'test_database'. Remove default to fail fast if misconfigured
All core functionality works correctly: Jikan API integration, caching, rate limiting, authentication, watchlist CRUD
seed_data_creation: Backend tests automatically create test users with prefix 'TEST_' for each test run. These are cleaned up per test. Frontend testing created user: testuser57183
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working perfectly. Frontend has 2 minor UI bugs (Sign In button visibility, duplicate React keys). Core app features (search, browse, auth, watchlist, episode player) all functional. Jikan API integration is solid with caching and rate limiting. Video streaming is MOCKED as expected.

backend: Anime API: top anime (airing, bypopularity, upcoming)
Watchlist: GET, POST, DELETE, check endpoint
Validation: duplicate email/username, empty search query, authentication requirements
frontend: Home screen loads with real anime data from Jikan API
Tab navigation: Home, Browse, My List, Profile
